# VibedGallery — Full Reference

> A curated gallery of apps built with AI coding tools. Submit a live URL, prove ownership with a verification file, and get listed after admin approval.

## Overview

VibedGallery showcases projects created with AI-assisted development tools — Cursor, Windsurf, Lovable, Bolt, Replit, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, v0, and others. Users register, submit their app's live URL with metadata, verify site ownership via a cryptographic token-based HTML file, and wait for human admin approval. Approved apps appear in a public gallery with upvotes, bookmarks, search, filtering, and maker profiles.

---

## Stack

- **Frontend**: React 18 + Vite 6, React Router 6 (SPA with lazy-loaded routes), TanStack Query 5 (data fetching + caching), Tailwind CSS 3, shadcn/ui (Radix UI primitives), framer-motion (page transitions + animations), lucide-react (icons), Vercel Analytics + Speed Insights
- **Backend**: Supabase — Postgres with Row-Level Security (RLS) for all tables, Storage bucket `app-images` for uploads, seven Edge Functions (Deno runtime) for server-side work
- **Anti-abuse**: Cloudflare Turnstile (captcha) on register + submit, Google Safe Browsing on submitted URLs, Google Cloud Vision for image moderation, SSRF guards on Edge Functions
- **Email**: Resend, called from the `send-email` Edge Function
- **Hosting**: Vercel (static SPA deployment with rewrites, security headers, and OG image proxying)
- **Security headers**: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, strict Referrer-Policy, restrictive Permissions-Policy

---

## Project Layout

```
src/
  App.jsx                    — Routes + providers (ErrorBoundary > Router > AuthProvider > QueryClientProvider)
  main.jsx                   — Bootstrap (ReactDOM.createRoot)
  index.css                  — Tailwind base + custom styles

  pages/
    Home.jsx                 — Landing page with featured/trending apps
    Gallery.jsx              — Paginated, filterable, sortable app listing (infinite scroll)
    AppDetail.jsx            — Single app view with screenshots, upvotes, tags, maker info
    Tag.jsx                  — Apps filtered by a specific tag
    Maker.jsx                — Public maker profile page
    Submit.jsx               — Protected submission form
    Admin.jsx                — Admin review queue
    Profile.jsx              — User profile + submission history + bookmarks
    HowItWorks.jsx           — Submission flow explainer
    About.jsx                — About page
    Login.jsx                — Email/password + OAuth login
    Register.jsx             — Registration with email OTP verification
    ForgotPassword.jsx       — Password reset request
    ResetPassword.jsx        — New password form
    AuthCallback.jsx         — OAuth callback handler

  components/
    Nav.jsx                  — Top navigation bar
    SearchBar.jsx            — Global search with URL-synced query parameter
    Turnstile.jsx            — Cloudflare Turnstile captcha widget wrapper
    ProtectedRoute.jsx       — Auth gate (optional adminOnly flag)
    ErrorBoundary.jsx        — Top-level React error boundary
    BookmarkButton.jsx       — Bookmark toggle with optimistic updates
    ReportDialog.jsx         — Report inappropriate content dialog
    AnalyticsPanel.jsx       — Admin analytics panel
    Footer.jsx               — Site footer
    PageTransition.jsx       — framer-motion page transition wrapper
    ScrollToTop.jsx          — Scrolls to top on route change
    Skeleton.jsx             — Loading skeleton components
    AuthLayout.jsx           — Shared layout for auth pages
    GithubIcon.jsx           — GitHub SVG icon
    GoogleIcon.jsx           — Google SVG icon
    ui/                      — shadcn/ui primitives (button, card, dialog, toast, tabs, select, etc.)

  lib/
    supabaseClient.js        — Singleton supabase-js client
    AuthContext.jsx           — React context: session management, profile fetching, auth methods (login, register, OAuth, OTP, password reset)
    useApps.js               — TanStack Query hooks for apps, bookmarks, and maker lookups
    query-client.js          — QueryClient singleton with default options
    edgeFunctions.js         — Thin wrappers around all Edge Functions
    safeBrowsing.js          — Client wrapper for check-url-safety Edge Function
    imageCheck.js            — Client-side image validation (dimensions, file size)
    imageConstraints.js      — Shared image constraint constants
    verifyOwnership.js       — Client-side ownership verification + token management
    verifyTokens.js          — Pure token generation + verification HTML builder
    upvote.js                — Pure helpers for optimistic upvote math
    urlHelpers.js            — URL normalization, search term sanitization, redirect path validation
    submitErrors.js          — Submission error message mapping
    usePageMeta.js           — Dynamic page title/meta management
    PageNotFound.jsx         — 404 page
    utils.js                 — General utilities (cn for class merging)

  hooks/
    use-mobile.jsx           — Mobile viewport detection hook

  utils/
    index.ts                 — Shared utility exports

supabase/
  config.toml                — Supabase CLI configuration
  functions/
    _shared/
      cors.ts                — CORS headers helper for Edge Functions
      ssrfGuard.ts           — SSRF protection (blocks private IPs, localhost, metadata endpoints)
      verifyToken.ts         — JWT verification helper for Edge Functions
    send-email/index.ts      — Transactional email via Resend (JWT + RLS-aware)
    verify-html/index.ts     — Server-side ownership file check (bypasses CORS)
    verify-turnstile/index.ts — Cloudflare Turnstile captcha verification
    check-url-safety/index.ts — Google Safe Browsing API wrapper
    check-image-safety/index.ts — Google Cloud Vision moderation
    og-app/index.ts          — Dynamic Open Graph image generation for social sharing
    sitemap/index.ts         — Dynamic XML sitemap generation

tests/
  submit.test.js             — Submission flow tests
  upvote.test.js             — Upvote math tests
  verify.test.js             — Ownership verification tests
  urlHelpers.test.js         — URL helper tests
  ssrfGuard.test.js          — SSRF guard tests

public/
  favicon.svg                — Site favicon
  og-image.png               — Default Open Graph image
  robots.txt                 — Search engine directives
  privacy.html               — Privacy policy
  terms.html                 — Terms of service
```

---

## Routes

| Path | Component | Access | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/` | Home | Public | Landing page with featured/trending apps |
| `/gallery` | Gallery | Public | Paginated gallery with sort (Newest/Trending/Most Viewed), category filter, search |
| `/:username/:appslug` | AppDetail | Public | Single app detail (screenshots, upvotes, tags, maker link). Pretty URL, e.g. `/zudowoodo/notenotes`. Legacy `/app/:id` still works and redirects here. |
| `/tag/:tag` | Tag | Public | Apps matching a specific tag |
| `/maker/:userId` | Maker | Public | Public maker profile with their approved apps |
| `/how-it-works` | HowItWorks | Public | Submission flow explainer |
| `/about` | About | Public | About page |
| `/login` | Login | Public | Email/password + OAuth (GitHub, Google) |
| `/register` | Register | Public | Registration with Turnstile captcha + email OTP |
| `/forgot-password` | ForgotPassword | Public | Password reset email request |
| `/reset-password` | ResetPassword | Public | Set new password (from email link) |
| `/auth/callback` | AuthCallback | Public | OAuth redirect handler |
| `/submit` | Submit | Authenticated | App submission form |
| `/admin` | Admin | Admin only | Review queue with verification tools |
| `/profile` | Profile | Authenticated | Profile editing, submission history, bookmarks |

---

## Database Schema

All tables have Row-Level Security (RLS) enabled.

### `profiles`
- 1:1 with `auth.users` (created via trigger on signup)
- Columns: `id` (uuid, PK), `name`, `avatar_url`, `role` (user | admin), `created_at`, `updated_at`
- `submitter_email` is locked down — anon/authenticated have no SELECT privilege

### `apps`
- Submitted applications
- Status lifecycle: `pending_verification` → `pending_review` → `approved` | `rejected`
- Key columns: `id`, `user_id`, `title`, `tagline`, `description`, `url`, `category`, `tags` (text[]), `primary_tool`, `other_tools`, `demo_video_url`, `thumbnail_url`, `screenshot_urls` (text[]), `verification_token`, `ownership_verified`, `safe_browsing_passed`, `safe_browsing_threats`, `thumbnail_flagged`, `status`, `rejection_reason`, `reviewed_by`, `reviewed_at`, `submitter_twitter`, `submitter_github`, `upvotes`, `views`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

### `upvotes`
- One row per (user, app) — unique constraint
- Columns: `id`, `user_id`, `app_id`, `created_at`

### `bookmarks`
- Saved apps per user — unique constraint on (user_id, app_id)
- Columns: `id`, `user_id`, `app_id`, `created_at`

### `public_profiles` (view)
- Exposes safe profile fields (id, name, avatar_url, created_at) for public maker pages
- `security_invoker = true`

### Storage
- Bucket: `app-images` (public CDN access, no API enumeration)

---

## Submission Flow (Detailed)

1. **Form entry** (`/submit`): User fills title, tagline, description, URL, category, primary AI tool, optional tags, screenshots, demo video URL, social links
2. **Captcha**: Cloudflare Turnstile token verified via `verify-turnstile` Edge Function
3. **URL safety**: Submitted URL checked against Google Safe Browsing via `check-url-safety` Edge Function
4. **Image upload**: Thumbnail uploaded to `app-images` Storage bucket, moderated via `check-image-safety` Edge Function (Cloud Vision)
5. **Row creation**: App inserted with `status = 'pending_verification'`; a 128-bit hex verification token is generated client-side
6. **Verification file**: User downloads `<token>.html` and deploys it to their site's public folder
7. **Ownership confirmation**: Clicking "I've Deployed The File" transitions status to `pending_review` and sets `ownership_verified = true`
8. **Admin review** (`/admin`): Admin runs `verify-html` Edge Function against the live URL (server-side, bypasses CORS), then approves or rejects with optional reason
9. **Notification**: Submitter receives email via `send-email` Edge Function (approval or rejection with reason)

---

## Edge Functions

All Edge Functions run on Deno (Supabase Edge Functions runtime).

### `send-email`
- Sends transactional email via Resend API
- JWT + RLS-aware authentication
- Email types: submission confirmation, approval notification, rejection notification, admin notification
- Secrets: `RESEND_API_KEY`, `EMAIL_FROM`, `ADMIN_EMAIL`

### `verify-html`
- Server-side ownership file check — fetches `<url>/<token>.html` and `<url>/<token>.txt`
- Bypasses browser CORS restrictions
- SSRF-guarded (blocks private IPs, localhost, metadata endpoints)
- No secrets required (uses Supabase auto-injected credentials)

### `verify-turnstile`
- Validates Cloudflare Turnstile captcha tokens server-side
- Secrets: `TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY`

### `check-url-safety`
- Wraps Google Safe Browsing Lookup API v4
- Returns `{ safe, threats[], skipped? }`
- Gracefully degrades if `GOOGLE_SAFE_BROWSING_KEY` is not configured (returns `skipped: true`)
- Secrets: `GOOGLE_SAFE_BROWSING_KEY` (optional)

### `check-image-safety`
- Image moderation via Google Cloud Vision SafeSearch
- Returns `{ safe, threats[], skipped? }`
- Gracefully degrades if `GOOGLE_CLOUD_VISION_KEY` is not configured
- Secrets: `GOOGLE_CLOUD_VISION_KEY` (optional)

### `og-app`
- Generates dynamic Open Graph HTML for social media previews on `/:username/:appslug` (and legacy `/app/:id`) URLs
- Triggered by bot user-agent detection in `vercel.json` rewrites

### `sitemap`
- Generates dynamic XML sitemap with all approved app URLs
- Served at `/sitemap.xml` via Vercel rewrite

### Shared Utilities (`_shared/`)
- `cors.ts` — CORS headers for Edge Function responses
- `ssrfGuard.ts` — Blocks requests to private IP ranges, localhost, link-local, metadata endpoints (169.254.x.x, AWS/GCP/Azure metadata)
- `verifyToken.ts` — JWT verification for authenticated Edge Function calls

---

## Authentication

- **Email/password**: Registration with email OTP verification (6-digit code)
- **OAuth**: GitHub and Google sign-in via Supabase Auth
- **Session**: Managed by supabase-js; `AuthContext` listens to `onAuthStateChange` for token refreshes
- **Profile loading**: Fetched once per unique user ID (ref-guarded to prevent redundant fetches on token refresh)
- **Redirect handling**: Post-auth redirect stored in `sessionStorage` (avoids Supabase redirect-URL allowlist issues); `sanitizeRedirectPath` prevents open redirects
- **Captcha**: Turnstile required on registration and submission (bypassed in dev when `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY` is blank)

---

## Data Fetching

TanStack Query hooks in `useApps.js`:

- `useApprovedApps()` — All approved apps (single-shot, used by homepage)
- `useApprovedAppsInfinite({ sort, category, q })` — Server-paginated gallery (24 per page) with sort (Newest/Trending/Most Viewed), category filter, and ilike text search
- `useApp(id)` — Single app by UUID
- `useApprovedAppsByMaker(userId)` — Maker's approved apps
- `useAppsByTag(tag)` — Apps containing a specific tag (server-side `.contains()`)
- `useBookmarkedApps(userId)` — User's bookmarked apps (joined query)
- `useBookmarkIds(userId)` — Set of bookmarked app IDs (for O(1) lookup)
- `useToggleBookmark(userId)` — Optimistic bookmark toggle mutation
- `useMaker(userId)` — Public profile from `public_profiles` view

Column sets:
- `APP_PUBLIC_COLUMNS` — Lean set for public reads (no review-pipeline internals)
- `APP_SELECT_COLUMNS` — Full set for admin/owner views (includes verification_token, safe_browsing_*, etc.)
- `submitter_email` is never selected — locked at DB level

---

## Security Measures

- **Row-Level Security**: All tables have RLS enabled; policies restrict reads/writes per role
- **SSRF Protection**: Edge Functions use `ssrfGuard.ts` to block requests to private IPs, localhost, and cloud metadata endpoints
- **Input Sanitization**: `sanitizeSearchTerm()` strips PostgREST metacharacters from search queries; `sanitizeRedirectPath()` prevents open redirects
- **Content Security Policy**: Strict CSP via Vercel headers (script-src, connect-src, frame-src whitelisted)
- **Security Headers**: HSTS (2-year max-age, preload), X-Frame-Options DENY, nosniff, strict referrer policy, restrictive permissions policy
- **Column-level access control**: `submitter_email` has no SELECT privilege for anon/authenticated roles; admins fetch via RPC
- **Captcha**: Cloudflare Turnstile on registration and submission with server-side verification
- **URL validation**: Google Safe Browsing check before app approval
- **Image moderation**: Cloud Vision SafeSearch before thumbnail acceptance

---

## Environment Variables

### Client-side (Vite `VITE_*` prefix, shipped in bundle)
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` | Supabase project URL |
| `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | Supabase anonymous/publishable key |
| `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY` | Cloudflare Turnstile site key (blank to bypass in dev) |
| `VITE_APP_BASE_URL` | App base URL (http://localhost:5173 for dev) |

### Edge Function Secrets (set via `supabase secrets set`)
| Secret | Used by | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | send-email | Yes |
| `EMAIL_FROM` | send-email | Yes |
| `ADMIN_EMAIL` | send-email | Yes |
| `TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY` | verify-turnstile | Yes |
| `GOOGLE_SAFE_BROWSING_KEY` | check-url-safety | No (degrades gracefully) |
| `GOOGLE_CLOUD_VISION_KEY` | check-image-safety | No (degrades gracefully) |

`SUPABASE_URL` and `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` are auto-injected by the platform.

---

## Scripts

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `npm run dev` | Vite dev server (http://localhost:5173) |
| `npm run build` | Production bundle to `dist/` |
| `npm run preview` | Serve the built bundle locally |
| `npm run lint` | ESLint (errors only, quiet mode) |
| `npm run lint:fix` | ESLint with auto-fix |
| `npm run typecheck` | TypeScript checking over JSX sources (via jsconfig.json) |
| `npm test` | Node test runner on `tests/**/*.test.js` |

---

## Deployment

Static SPA deployed to Vercel. `vercel.json` configures:
- SPA fallback rewrite (`/(.*) → /index.html`)
- Static page rewrites (`/privacy → /privacy.html`, `/terms → /terms.html`)
- Sitemap rewrite (`/sitemap.xml → sitemap Edge Function`)
- OG image bot detection (user-agent matching for social crawlers → `og-app` Edge Function)
- Security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.)

---

## Key Dependencies

| Package | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `react` + `react-dom` | UI framework |
| `react-router-dom` | Client-side routing |
| `@tanstack/react-query` | Server state management + caching |
| `@supabase/supabase-js` | Supabase client (auth, DB, storage, functions) |
| `tailwindcss` + `tailwind-merge` | Utility-first CSS |
| `@radix-ui/*` | Accessible UI primitives (via shadcn/ui) |
| `framer-motion` | Page transitions + animations |
| `lucide-react` | Icon library |
| `zod` | Schema validation |
| `react-hook-form` + `@hookform/resolvers` | Form management |
| `sonner` | Toast notifications |
| `recharts` | Admin analytics charts |
| `date-fns` | Date formatting |
| `class-variance-authority` | Component variant management |
| `vaul` | Drawer component |
| `cmdk` | Command palette |
| `@vercel/analytics` + `@vercel/speed-insights` | Production analytics |
